meta.title: OrbitEOS — Energy Management for the AI Era
meta.description: Monitor solar, battery, and grid in real time. Control everything through AI assistants. The intelligent energy management platform.

hero.title:
Energy Management
for the AI Era
hero.subtitle:
Monitor solar, battery, and grid in real time.
Control everything through AI assistants.

features.title:
Everything you need to
manage energy intelligently
features.subtitle: A complete platform for monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy systems — from a single home to thousands of sites.

dashboard.title: Live Energy Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Real-time power flow visualization showing every watt moving through your system — solar, battery, grid, and consumption.

ai.title: AI-Powered Control
ai.desc: Ask questions and give commands in natural language through Claude, ChatGPT, or any MCP-compatible AI assistant.

battery.title: Battery Intelligence
battery.desc: Smart charge and discharge optimization that learns your patterns and maximizes self-consumption and battery lifespan.

grid.title: Grid Optimization
grid.desc: Peak shaving, self-consumption maximization, and demand response — automatically reduce your electricity costs.

multiSite.title: Multi-Site Management
multiSite.desc: Hierarchical site tree with role-based access control. Manage regions, hubs, sites, and zones from a single pane.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.desc: Extend with plugins for device drivers, analytics, control strategies, notifications, and dashboard widgets.

energyFlow.title: See every watt, in real time
energyFlow.subtitle: Watch energy flow through your system — from solar panels to battery storage to grid and consumption.

ai.aiMsg1:
System Health Check

Your Munich Factory site is running normally.

Solar: 5.2 kW (producing)
Battery: 85% SoC (charging)
Grid: 0.3 kW (minimal import)
Load: 3.8 kW

Self-consumption rate: 94%. All components online.
ai.userMsg2: Set battery to charge from grid overnight
ai.aiMsg2: Done. Battery scheduled for grid charging 23:00–06:00 at off-peak rate.
ai.title: Built for the AI era
ai.subtitle: OrbitEOS works natively with your favorite AI assistants through the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Ask questions, get insights, and control your energy system — all in natural language.
ai.note: Works with Claude, ChatGPT, and any MCP-compatible AI assistant.

howItWorks.title: Get started in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to intelligent energy management.

step1.title: Connect
step1.desc: Link your energy system — inverters, meters, batteries, EV chargers. Supports all major brands through our marketplace.

step2.title: Monitor
step2.desc: See real-time energy flows, historical analytics, and system health. Set alerts and track performance across all your sites.

step3.title: Optimize
step3.desc: Let AI assistants analyze your energy patterns, suggest optimizations, and control your system — all through natural conversation.

useCases.title: Built for every scale
useCases.subtitle: From a single home to entire energy communities.

residential.title: Residential
residential.desc: Smart battery management learns your household patterns and optimizes when to store, use, or export energy — reducing your electricity bill automatically.

commercial.title: Commercial
commercial.desc: Peak shaving, load management, and grid optimization strategies that cut commercial electricity costs. Multi-site fleet view for portfolios.

community.title: Energy Communities
community.desc: Hierarchical site management with role-based access. Aggregate data across hundreds of sites, manage sub-accounts, and optimize fleet-wide performance.

platform.title: Infinitely extensible
platform.subtitle: An open platform that grows with your needs.

marketplace.title: Plugin Marketplace
marketplace.desc: Device drivers, analytics modules, control strategies, and dashboard widgets — install in one click.

api.title: REST API + WebSocket
api.desc: Full programmatic access to every feature. Build custom dashboards, integrations, and automation.

mcp.title: MCP Integration
mcp.desc: Native Model Context Protocol support. Connect any AI assistant to your energy system in seconds.

cta.title: Start managing energy smarter
cta.subtitle: Join the next generation of energy management. Free to start, scales with you.

footer.tagline: Energy Management for the AI Era
